title: Better Welcome Messages
body:
# Better Welcome Messages
inspired by [First Join Message](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-join-message), this mod adds in colorful welcome messages, it utilises the [placeholder api](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/) to let you add color to your welcome message. `/bwm` for commands. Also supports permissions!
## Changing
By default the mod will resend the welcome message if it changes
## Requires:
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)
- [Fabric Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
## Guide
read [the docs here](https://ninekothecat.github.io/BetterWelcomeMessages/stable/) to learn how to use this mod.
